MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Harry Chern is present.
Attorney Andres Sanchez appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Tammy Choy is present.
Attorney Nathaniel Player representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Cary Gold, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of JUL-09-2012 is vacated.
